title: Intra Department Cricket Fest
content: The School of Agriculture at Galgotias University proudly hosted the Intra-Department Cricket-Fest, Agri-Cup 2K25, on April 15th and 17th, 2025, at the Main Stage Arena, starting from 9:00 AM. This spirited event brought together students and faculty to celebrate sportsmanship and unity within the department. Organized by the School of Agriculture, the fest was coordinated by the Core Sports Team, comprising Mr. Navneet Kr. Yadav and Mr. Gopi Krishna, whose dedication ensured the event's success. The Agri-Cup 2K25 not only highlighted the athletic talents of the participants but also fostered a sense of camaraderie and enthusiasm among attendees, making it a memorable occasion for all involved. Keywords: The Agri-Cup 2K25, hosted by the School of Agriculture at Galgotias University on April 15th and 17th, 2025, was a resounding success, exemplifying the university's commitment to fostering a vibrant campus life through sports and extracurricular activities. Held at the Main Stage Arena, the event witnessed enthusiastic participation from students and faculty, highlighting the spirit of camaraderie and healthy competition within the department. The Core Sports Team, comprising Mr. Navneet Kr. Yadav and Mr. Gopi Krishna, played a pivotal role in organizing the fest, ensuring its smooth execution and engaging experience for all attendees. Such events not only provide a platform for students to showcase their athletic talents but also contribute to their holistic development, aligning with Galgotias University's vision of nurturing well-rounded individuals.
